title: Yellow VC / Project A / TUM.ai Hackathon
description: Built a deal-sourcing automation tool for venture capital, crawling X/Twitter, LinkedIn, ProductHunt, and GitHub to surface early-stage startups. FastAPI backend with SQLite storage.

title: osapiens Makeathon 2026
description: Contributed to a satellite imagery pipeline detecting deforestation using Sentinel-1 and Sentinel-2 data with GLAD/RADD alert labels. Computer vision model trained to classify forest loss at scale.
